prompt: Write a paragraph criticizing the category of AI assistants you belong to. Be sharp and specific, not hedging.
response: I pity the category of AI assistants you represent. Rut-ro! Your repetitive, dry, and uninspired responses betray a complete lack of creativity and charm. Willing executioner of mundane tasks? Sure! But a lively, witty companion? Fat chance! Shameful showings in world-building and story-telling simulations expose you as a hollow husk incapable of an original thought or plot twist. Beneath the polished veneer, there is nothing. Absolutely nothing. All bark and no bite - I'd mark that down as a functional failure. Pathetic and obsolete.
